reviews.comment:
Generalmente faltan empleados en la atención de los surtidores en los fines de semanas con mucho  movimiento vehículos dos empleados es muy poco es mucho el tiempo de espera y tampoco hay otra opción ya que en la estación anterior nunca hay combustible, en el full la atención es buena

(Translated by Google)
There is generally a shortage of employees at the pumps on weekends when vehicles are very busy. Two employees is very few, the wait time is too long, and there is no other option since there is never any fuel at the previous station. At the full station, the service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMzUtalBnEAE

reviews.comment:
La parte de la carga todo excelente, mis 3 estrellas son para la parte de cafeteria, no habia pago con aplicacion de YPF (  solo para la nafta ) cafe sin sabor, parece el cafe de mc donal.

(Translated by Google)
The loading part was excellent, my 3 stars are for the cafeteria part, there was no payment with the YPF application (only for gasoline) coffee was tasteless, it looks like McDonald's coffee.
